# snippets/props

Generated Mintlify `<ParamField>` snippet files for `@dreamboard/ui-sdk` component props.

**Do not edit these files directly.** They are generated from TypeScript interface
definitions in `packages/ui-sdk/src/components/`.

To regenerate after a component's props change:

```bash
pnpm docs:gen-props
```

These files are committed to the repository so Mintlify can resolve the snippet
imports in `docs/reference/ui-library.mdx` at build time.
